title: AnimalFeedCalculator Result Schema
description: Schema for AnimalFeedCalculator inputs and outputs, including livestock, weight, and ration-level details for SSA Planning Graph and SessionRunner integration.

context.description: High-level context for this calculation run (used for analytics and Planning Graph).

domain.description: SSA domain where this calculator is active.

calculatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the calculation was performed.

planningHorizonDays.description: Number of days forward used for batch and projection calculations.

unitSystem.description: Unit system used for weights and volumes.

farmLocation.description: Optional farm or site identifier for analytics.

notes.description: Free-form notes or description about this calculation run.

animals.description: List of animals or groups included in this feed calculation.

dailyFeedPlan.description: Per-animal (or per-group) daily feed rations with as-fed and dry-matter totals.

feedBatchPlan.description: Aggregated feed requirements over the planning horizon for batching, pre-mixing, or bagging feed in advance.

feedDemandProjection.description: Projected inventory drawdown by feed item over the planning horizon.

nutritionGaps.description: Flags where animals or groups are under- or over-supplied for key nutrients.

analytics.description: Optional roll-up metrics useful for dashboards and Planning Graph analytics.

totalAsFedKgPerDay.description: Total as-fed kg of feed used per day across all animals.

totalDryMatterKgPerDay.description: Total dry-matter kg of feed used per day across all animals.

estimatedFeedCostPerDay.description: Estimated daily feed cost across all animals (in base currency).

projectedShortageDays.description: Earliest day on which any feed item is projected to be exhausted, relative to calculation date.

AnimalSubject.description: Represents a single animal or a homogeneous group (pen) for which a ration is calculated.

id.description: Unique identifier for this animal or group (should match animals.registry id when available).

displayName.description: Friendly name for UI (e.g., 'Dairy does – Pen A', 'Steer #14').

count.description: Number of animals represented by this subject.

weightKg.description: Average live bodyweight per head in kilograms.

targetWeightKg.description: Target live weight per head (if growth or conditioning is a goal).

averageDailyGainKg.description: Desired or observed average daily gain in kg per head.

location.description: Barn/pen/pasture or other location label for this subject.

AnimalDailyFeedPlan.description: Daily ration breakdown for a single animal subject.

rationId.description: Identifier for this ration (used to group feed prep tasks and sessions).

timesPerDay.description: Number of times per day this ration is fed.

feedItems.description: List of feed components that make up this ration.

totals.description: Summed amounts of feed for this subject (per day).

asFedKgPerHeadPerDay.description: Total as-fed feed weight per head per day (kg).

dryMatterKgPerHeadPerDay.description: Total dry-matter feed weight per head per day (kg).

proteinPctOfDM.description: Approximate crude protein percentage of dry matter in the ration.

energyMjPerHeadPerDay.description: Estimated metabolizable energy provided per head per day (MJ).

estimatedCostPerHeadPerDay.description: Estimated feed cost per head per day (currency).

instructions.description: Short instruction string suitable for a SessionRunner step (e.g., 'Feed 1.5 kg hay + 0.3 kg grain twice per day').

FeedRationItem.description: One feed ingredient in a ration for a subject.

feedItemId.description: Identifier for the feed item (should map to a storehouse inventory item when possible).

name.description: Human-readable name of the feed (e.g., 'alfalfa hay', 'corn', 'mineral mix').

asFedKgPerHeadPerDay.description: As-fed amount per head per day (kg).

dryMatterPercent.description: Percent dry matter in this feed (0–100).

dryMatterKgPerHeadPerDay.description: Dry-matter amount per head per day (kg).

crudeProteinPercentOfDM.description: Crude protein percentage of the dry matter (0–100).

energyMjPerKgDM.description: Metabolizable energy per kg of dry matter (MJ/kg DM).

estimatedCostPerKgAsFed.description: Estimated cost per kg as-fed (in base currency).

feedingTimeHints.description: Times of day when this feed is typically offered (used for scheduling sessions).

notes.description: Special handling or constraints (e.g., 'do not feed to sheep', 'introduce gradually').

FeedBatchRequirement.description: Aggregated feed amount required over the planning horizon for a given feed item.

totalAsFedKg.description: Total as-fed kg required over the planning horizon.

totalDryMatterKg.description: Total dry-matter kg required over the planning horizon.

estimatedCostTotal.description: Estimated total cost for this feed over the planning horizon.

FeedDemandProjectionEntry.description: Projected inventory use and potential shortage for a specific feed item.

feedItemId.description: Identifier for the feed item in inventory.

projectedUsageKg.description: Projected usage (as-fed kg) over the planning horizon.

projectedShortageKg.description: If > 0, the amount of shortage (usage minus inventory) in kg.

estimatedRunoutDate.description: Estimated date when this feed item will run out, if known.

NutritionGap.description: Represents a nutrition under- or over-supply issue for a subject.

direction.description: Whether the nutrient is lacking or excessive.

currentValue.description: Calculated current value (e.g., % of requirement, or absolute).

targetValue.description: Target value or range midpoint for this nutrient.

message.description: Human-readable explanation suitable for UI (e.g., 'Protein is 20% below target; consider adding more high-protein feed.').
